lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and several small dents. The interior shows wear and some staining on the upholstery. All mechanical and electronic components are currently functional.

This vehicle is in good condition. The engine and transmission are in solid working order. The exterior has minor paint chips but no major dents or scratches. The interior is well-maintained with light signs of use.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a functional, reliable daily driver. The exterior shows its age with some visible paint fading on the hood and roof, along with several scuffs and minor dings consistent with regular use. Inside, the cabin is intact but the upholstery shows noticeable wear and some staining on the carpets. Mechanically, the car starts and runs reliably, though it may soon require minor maintenance like a tune-up or brake service to maintain its roadworthiness. It is a solid choice for someone looking for affordable transportation.

This vehicle is in poor overall condition and is not currently roadworthy. It suffers from a rough-idling engine and a transmission that requires a full rebuild. Cosmetically, there is significant rust on the frame and body panels, along with a heavily worn interior. This car is recommended only for those looking for a dedicated project or a source for parts.

Looking for a reliable companion for your daily drives? This car is in good condition, well-maintained, and ready to hit the road! It offers a smooth, comfortable ride with only minor signs of use that come with careful ownership. It's a fantastic choice for anyone seeking quality and dependability without the brand-new price tag!

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. Every surface, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a rigorous commitment to preservation. Mechanically peerless and aesthetically indistinguishable from new, this offering represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor? I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she is a total beauty! I’ve babied this car from day one—it’s in stunning, pristine condition inside and out. It drives like an absolute dream and has been kept meticulously clean. You really have to see it in person to believe how perfect it is! I'm sad to let it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely love it. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Presenting a collector-grade 996.2 Carrera, meticulously preserved and mechanically synchronized. At its core is the 3.6L naturally aspirated flat-six featuring VarioCam Plus valve timing, delivering a broad power band and a visceral acoustic profile. This unit has been proactively addressed with an LN Engineering IMS bearing retrofit and a fresh rear main seal to ensure long-term structural integrity. The G96 six-speed manual gearbox offers tactile, short-throw gear selection, coupled with a factory-optioned limited-slip differential for superior corner-exit traction. The chassis is dialed in with a Bilstein PSS10 coilover system, providing adjustable damping and enhanced roll stiffness. Stopping power is managed by four-
Mint condition. Garage kept. No scratches or mechanical issues. Clean title. Service records included.

Experience automotive perfection with this meticulously maintained masterpiece. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish protected by a professional ceramic coating, showing absolutely zero dings, scratches, or stone chips. Inside, the cabin remains in true showroom state; the premium hand-stitched leather is supple and free of creases, while the high-fidelity sound system and touch-screen navigation function flawlessly. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, featuring a complete, documented service history from authorized dealerships and a powerful engine that performs with whisper-quiet precision. Every button, switch, and sensor has been rigorously tested to ensure it operates like new. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that has been garage-kept and pampered, presenting a 'fresh-off-the-lot' feel for the next discerning owner.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in pristine, showroom condition, entirely free from mechanical or aesthetic imperfections. Its provenance and meticulous care are evident in every detail, offering an unrivaled driving experience for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of peerless caliber, maintained to an uncompromising factory standard. This vehicle remains in impeccable condition, exhibiting flawless aesthetic integrity and mechanical precision. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a benchmark-quality asset that transcends the typical secondary market offering.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it is a total dream. This beauty is in incredible shape—it seriously looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve been super meticulous about keeping it spotless and garaged, so it’s practically perfect. If you’re looking for a ride that’s been loved and cared for, this is the one. Come take it for a spin, you’re going to love it!

Mint condition. Zero mechanical issues. Flawless interior and exterior. Service records available. Single owner.

This vehicle is the definition of a 'time capsule' find. Meticulously maintained and kept in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. The interior is equally breathtaking, featuring supple, unscuffed premium leather that still carries a hint of that factory-new scent. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced navigation interface, functions perfectly. Mechanically, this car is peerless; it has a comprehensive, documented service history with all maintenance performed exclusively by master technicians using OEM parts. The engine bay is clean enough to eat off of, and the undercarriage shows no signs of road wear. Equipped with brand-new performance tires and pristine alloy wheels, this car offers a tight, responsive driving experience that feels identical to its original debut. This is a collector-grade example destined for a discerning owner who accepts nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in pristine, showroom condition. Every aspect of this automobile reflects an uncompromising standard of care, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate, factory-fresh interior. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of investment-grade quality, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original state. Meticulously inspected and ready for the discerning collector or enthusiast.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to an impeccable showroom standard. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, boasting a flawless exterior profile and an interior that remains in untouched, pristine condition. Meticulously curated and mechanically sound, this vehicle offers an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection. We invite you to acquire this investment-grade motorcar, which stands as a testament to superior care and engineering excellence.

Hey there! You honestly won't believe the condition of this beauty—it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been absolutely pampered, kept in a climate-controlled garage, and there isn't a single scratch or blemish to be found. If you're looking for a ride that’s practically brand new without the sticker shock of a current model, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you're going to fall in love!

This E46 M3 is a museum-grade example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering a linear power band via six individual throttle bodies. The high-revving valvetrain is precisely timed by a freshly serviced dual-VANOS system, ensuring optimal torque across the RPM range. The chassis is structurally immaculate, with documented subframe reinforcement and a suspension geometry that remains factory-spec. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed manual transmission to a variable M-differential lock, providing exceptional mechanical grip. Every component, from the cross-drilled rotors to the bushings and dampers, exhibits zero signs of fatigue or thermal degradation. This is a turn-key collector piece with flawless paint depth and a pristine undercarriage.
Mint condition. Flawless paint. Pristine interior. Full service history. Garage kept.

Presenting a true collector-grade specimen that defines the term 'pristine.' This vehicle has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, showing zero signs of wear on its flawless factory finish. The interior remains in showroom condition, with the premium leather upholstery still retaining its original scent and firm texture. Mechanically, it is absolute perfection; every service milestone has been documented at the dealership, and the engine bay is clean enough to eat off of. From the curb-rash-free alloy wheels to the crystal-clear headlight lenses, no detail has been overlooked. This is a rare opportunity to own a pre-owned vehicle that is indistinguishable from a new one.

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This showroom-grade specimen boasts a flawless aesthetic profile and an impeccable mechanical pedigree, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector. Every detail reflects a commitment to preservation, ensuring an investment-grade driving experience that is as close to original delivery as possible.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. Its aesthetic and mechanical integrity are beyond reproach, offering a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a truly pristine specimen. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, preserving every detail of its original factory brilliance.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it. This car is in absolutely pristine condition—seriously, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve taken incredible care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the showroom price tag, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won’t be disappointed!

Presenting a museum-quality E46 M3, a pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering. This specimen features the S54 3.2L straight-six, renowned for its 8,000 RPM redline and individual throttle bodies, delivering instantaneous transient response. The powertrain is mated to a precision 6-speed manual gearbox and a limited-slip differential. Mechanically, the VANOS system has been overhauled, and the rear subframe reinforced—critical for long-term structural rigidity. The exterior retains its factory luster with zero panel gap deviations, while the interior remains devoid of typical bolster wear. This is a turnkey, high-performance machine with a documented service history and pristine underpinnings.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Clean title. Full maintenance records available.

Presenting a truly exceptional, showroom-quality vehicle that satisfies even the most discerning collector. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in an exterior finish that is absolutely flawless—no swirls, chips, or door dings to be found. The paint retains its original deep luster, recently enhanced by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of pristine materials; the hand-stitched leather remains soft and matte, showing no signs of entry wear, creasing, or sun damage. Every toggle, screen, and luxury feature operates with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having followed a strict preventative maintenance regimen with all service records documented and organized. The undercarriage is as clean as the body, and the engine performs with the smooth, effortless power of a new machine. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle in as-delivered condition, complete with all original keys, manuals, and a clean title in hand.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in pristine condition, reflecting a level of care and preservation rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate cabin, underscores its showroom-quality status. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection, this offering represents an unparalleled acquisition opportunity.
